scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && set PYTHONPATH=.&& .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && .\venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
